Video.summary: When Reno witnesses the cold-blooded murder of one of his trusted street pals, Reno himself becomes the victim of a brutal beating at the hands of the killers.
Video.title: Payback

Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: For Reno Raines, taking refuge in a small-town saloon becomes hazerdous.
Video.title: Eye Of The Storm

Video.summary: Hunter helps a distressed war buddy look for the kidnappers of his mail-order bride - CHARLES HALLAHAN stars.
Video.title: The Jade Woman

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall spend a frightening night in a remote mansion with a family of murder suspects.
Video.title: Night On Bald Mountain

Video.summary: Erik Estrada guest stars as a tough-minded detective who joins Hunter and McCall to catch a serial rapist.
Video.title: City Of Passion, Part 1

Video.summary: Tony sets out to trap a serial rapist whose victims are young blind women. Meanwhile, Rachel makes a surprising investment in art.
Video.title: Sight Unseen

Video.summary: After seeing his mother killed by a stranger, a boy withdraws deep into himself, prompting a sympathetic Tony to step up his efforts to catch the murderer.
Video.title: The Wicked Flee

Video.summary: After he shoots a woman in a drunken domestic squabble, Officer Kelly becomes the victim of a campaign.
Video.title: Officer April

Video.summary: A mugging triggers a woman's repressed memory of her brother's murder, which she witnessed as a child.
Video.title: Skeletons

Video.summary: McCall fails to report a felony, and Hunter tries to trap the killer of a teenage prostitute.
Video.title: City Of Passion, Part 3

Video.summary: The unwelcome appearance in Eastbridge of white supremacists leads to a murder, with the suspicion soon arising that one of more Tony's associates may be implicated.
Video.title: True Believers

Video.summary: During the holiday season, Tony investigates the murder of an elderly woman.
Video.title: No Greater Gift

Video.summary: Stella Stevens guest stars as a reclusive former movie queen -- and one of Tony's all-time fim favorites -- who is implicated in the real-life murder of her lover.
Video.title: Eastbridge Boulevard

Video.summary: Vietnamese gangs threaten Eastbridge and Tony steps in to help.
Video.title: Charlie Don't Surf

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali's friend and colleague, Chief of Detectives Irv Wallerstein, is struck down.
Video.title: The Fourth Man

Video.summary: A serial rapist known as Big Foot stalks McCall while Hunter investigates the death of a teenage prostitute.
Video.title: City Of Passion, Part 2

Video.summary: Racial tensions mount after the accidental shooting of the son of a Hispanic councilman by police.
Video.title: Flashpoint

Video.summary: After the murder of a crime boss, Hunter and McCall face an ethical dilemma: arrest the killer or let him go.
Video.title: Playing God

Video.summary: In the moment before Reno apprehends a murderer,a helmeted motorcycle rider breaks up the party with a pistol.
Video.title: The Talisman

Video.summary: The pipe-bomb murder of Reno's ex-partner Jack Varnell sends Reno and Bobby south of the border in search of the cop-killer.
Video.title: Partners

Video.summary: Reno's latest job gets personal - the bounty is on the head of Earl Lyons, an ex-Army Ranger from Reno's unit.
Video.title: Lyon's Roar
